metadata.description: Git utility skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-rebase
plugins.description: Interactive rebase via patches — reorder, edit, squash, and reword commits without git rebase -i

plugins.name: git-rebase-i
plugins.description: Scripted git rebase -i — reword, edit, or drop commits without interactive mode

plugins.name: interactive-staging
plugins.description: Selectively stage changes into discrete commits using git plumbing

plugins.name: harmonize-branches
plugins.description: Analyze branch topology, consolidate divergent branches, and resolve conflicts

plugins.name: peff-commit
plugins.description: Write a commit message in the style of Jeff King (peff) from the Git mailing list
